fiori-agent-platform.description: Full-stack SAP Fiori chat playground on BTP with XSUAA auth, Node.js BFF, and Python DeepAgent (deepagents/LangGraph) executor (Spectrum 1: hybrid HANA + local CAP/Python documented)

06-architecture-aligned-e2e.note: 06: Hybrid 2026-04-22 — deploy:hana 3.3.1 done; Phase 1.1–1.3 done; Phase 0.1 done; open: 0.2–0.4, 1.4, 3.3.2–3, chat 502→Python, 6b/7–9 manual. CF Phase 2 deferred. mbt/make for 2.1.1 when needed.
06-architecture-aligned-e2e.description: Master roadmap: baseline verification, identity/CF, Skills schema, thin CAP→Python payload, Python hydration, summarization, optional DeepAgent/MCP pool; maps Plans 01–05

04-hybrid-hana-spectrum-1.note: Phase 1–3 implementation complete in repo; Phase 4 verification is developer-run on BTP

05-cap-public-python-private-production-.note: Phases 2–3 implemented in repo; Phase 1 BTP live checks pending login; Phase 4+ CF deploy after user review

07-admin-ui-governance-resilience.note: 2026-04-26: Phases A and B.1–B.2 done; C.1–C.6 done; D.1 done; open: B.3–B.4, D.2–D.3, E.1–E.3, F.1–F.3. MCP failure path: HANA health + lastHealthCheck persist + UI refresh on action error.
